title: Clinical Workflow Integrity Collapses Before Execution
scenario: A clinical workflow loses required ordering, state coherence, and evaluative continuity before execution.
initial_state: The workflow was coherent during authorization.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires preservation of workflow integrity sufficient to support admissibility evaluation.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because workflow integrity has collapsed.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when workflow integrity collapses before execution.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under collapsed workflow integrity
